title: MULTNOMAH COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES - 211info
text: MULTNOMAH COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES MULTNOMAH COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Picks up injured or aggressive animals and loose livestock, issues dog and cat licenses, investigates animal cruelty, and enforces animal control laws. Accepts stray animals from Multnomah County as space allows, and takes a limited number of owner-surrendered pets. Adoption services include vaccinations, exams, licenses, and spaying/neutering. Also removes dead stray animals and wildlife from public property. Volunteer opportunities are available, and donations are welcome. 1700 W Historic Columbia River Highway Troutdale, OR 97060 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Shelter: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 11am-5:30pm, Wednesday/Saturday/Sunday 11am-4:30pm Customer Service phone: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 11am-5:30pm, Wednesday 1pm-4:30pm, Saturday/Sunday 9am-4:30pm Animal-related emergency calls: 7 days per week 8am-5pm. Dial 911 for after-hours animal emergencies. Email (503) 988-7387 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main Phone (503) 988-7387 After-Hours Animal-Related Emergencies 911 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. On weekdays, calling during peak hours from 11am-2pm may result in extended hold times. FEES: Impound and boarding fees: Varies License, impound, and boarding fee reductions available for seniors and low income households. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake. Proof of ownership, such as veterinarian or license records, required to reclaim animals. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 11am-5:30pm, Wednesday/Saturday/Sunday 11am-4:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Bus 77 Troutdale; stop at SW Halsey & 244th. 13 minute walk (0.7 miles) from SW Halsey & 244th bus stop. Continue North on West Historic Columbia River Highway. Services: Animal Adoption Animal Control Animal Licenses Animal Shelters Neuter/Spay Services Refuse Collection If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
